hypothesis: Multi-skip + 524K batch, original warmdown. Tests whether multi-skip alone (without frac warmdown fix) can handle the larger batch. On 1xH100 with 524K batch, step_ms~1127ms, warmdown_ms=2.7M >> 600K, so eff_lr~0.007. The accidental dampening is extreme here — if multi-skip helps, it must be through better gradient quality, not LR stabilization.
